title: U Bahn Berlin Pack
body:
This mod is for the transit railway mod and adds a new vehicle for your train layouts. Curently this mod adds the stadler J,JK,IK and HK train of the berlin subway. The models have realistic exterior and interior but the original sound is missing and will be added later. This project is currently a beta so it may contains texture errors or bugs. If you find an error please contact me on my discord.
